notes: Repairs the Spending Plan beta open error caused by the missing records renderer.
Makes the Spending Plan page cleaner by replacing large account cards with compact money-flow guidance.
Keeps the setup-and-assessment structure for income, spending, APs, and records.
Repository downloads include only the latest Windows package.
release: v0.6.26 Spending Plan open and layout repair
release_name: Spending Plan open and layout repair
release_notes: Repairs the Spending Plan open error and simplifies the Spending Plan layout into a cleaner assessment/setup interface.
